textByHash.2c2b81e9119c3830f466eb04a8a5abd9e220305a: I have absolutely no clue what you are on about. Sit down, catch your breath and explain please!
textByHash.d04e56b6286ee55dd8b7c0f6eeaa919080df2481: Oh aye. Good lad he is.
textByHash.838207dae08579f88bdc6acb3635c6f194d894ac: Ok... you lost me again. I just got back from visitin' him up top, he's fine.
textByHash.c66a62480bc49356d874e2b4f0847970c60b2784: Oh that. No no, he's quite ok. That was last week.
textByHash.2fc4fcd12c8b7e5810be1f93a09c224c4b54f34b: Why you. Unless you have seen the small village of Falador grow into a heaving city like I have of course!
textByHash.e215575db0344d371c47fdcbae46ca9d83186d3e: Well then! Enjoy your stay in our mountain home.
